description: Deterministic CREATE2 deployment of the canonical SwapProxy. Address depends only on {create2Factory, salt, initcodeHash}; any funded key can deploy it.
saltNote: Vanity-mined for a 4-leading-zero-byte address (Uniswap singleton convention, cf. Permit2/CaliburEntry).

source.note: The universal-router repo is the origin of the source, but it is NOT a live dependency. The frozen initcode below is the source of truth. The contract only references the IUniversalRouter interface, so UR router upgrades never change this address.

build.note: Matches the mainnet-verified 1005-byte SwapProxy runtime. This differs from the repo's universal-router foundry profile (optimizer_runs=1, bytecode_hash=none, 964-byte build), which is why we deploy the frozen initcode instead of recompiling.

legacy.mechanism: plain CREATE at nonce 0 of deployer 0xb259f71F8Fa2B0165c4d71061C4bf6c77444aC87
legacy.note: Pre-CREATE2 deployments. Immutable and ownerless, so they remain on-chain; consumers migrate to the CREATE2 address above.
